title: TRNightmares
description:
This is a Tensura Reincarnated Addon. This expands on a of things and adds a ton of unique content.

This mod requires Tensura Reincarnated, ManasCore, Tensura Mysticism.
body: This is a Tensura Reincarned Addon by the name of TRNightmare. This focuses is on added a ton of unique content. This mod requires Tensura Reincarnated, ManasCore, Tensura Mysticism. This mod adds in almost 40 Unique and Ultimate Skills as well as several races and more.
